title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is an AI video generation platform that addresses character consistency in AI films through storyboard mode, character locking across scenes, camera presets, shot extension, and built-in timeline editing. The tutorial demonstrates a complete 60-second short film workflow without external software.
